nasb.text: So it came about at evening that the quails came up and covered the camp, and in the morning there was a layer of dew around the camp.

esv.text: In the evening quail came up and covered the camp, and in the morning dew lay around the camp.

cnv.text: 到了晚上，有鵪鶉飛上來，把營都遮蓋了；到了早晨，營的四周有一層露水。

ccb.text: 到了黄昏，果然有许多鹌鹑飞来，把营地都遮盖了。到了早晨，营区四周的地上布满露水，
